plan.description: Planning tasks, architecture design, complex problem solving

architect.description: Planning tasks, architecture design, complex problem solving

taskify.description: Converts free-text tasks into structured task.json for pipeline routing

gap.description: Analyzes spec.md for gaps, missing info, and inconsistencies

plan-review.description: Reviews architect plan for quality and completeness

autofix.description: Automatically fixes lint, type, and format errors from verify stage

apply-audit.description: Applies auditor recommendations to pipeline artifacts

verify.description: Runs tests, validates implementation passes all gates

test.description: Writes E2E and integration tests using Playwright

pr.description: Creates branch, commits changes, opens pull request
